productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Checks Red Shirts
description: Composition Red and white check shirt with light red accents, made of 100% cotton, has a tipped collar with red inseam, front buttoned placket with red inseam, full length sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid sleeve buttoned flap, pocket on left chest and a curved hemline Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Hand wash or machine wash cold using mild detergent Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Checks that add immense style to your casual look is what indigo nation brings into your life. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with formal pants, denims or corduroys and black footwear for stylish formal and casual looks. Model statistics The model wears size 40 in shirts Height: 6’1”; Chest: 38.5”; Shoulders: 18.5”
